nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 温带森林
nodes.summary: 温带岛屿或山地森林生态系统。

nodes.name: 圣卡塔琳娜州
nodes.summary: 圣卡塔琳娜州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、锯嘴蜂鸟等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴拉那州
nodes.summary: 巴拉那州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-tailed potoo等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Striolated tit-spinetail
nodes.summary: Striolated tit-spinetail（Striolated tit-spinetail，学名 Leptasthenura striolata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括温带森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The striolated tit-spinetail is found in much of the southern Brazilian states of Paraná and Santa Catarina, and somewhat into northern Rio Grande do Sul

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The striolated tit-spinetail is found in much of the southern Brazilian states of Paraná and Santa Catarina, and somewhat into northern Rio Grande do Sul

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The striolated tit-spinetail is found in much of the southern Brazilian states of Paraná and Santa Catarina, and somewhat into northern Rio Grande do Sul

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits temperate forests dominated by Podocarpus and especially Araucaria, and also riparian thickets and secondary forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits temperate forests dominated by Podocarpus and especially Araucaria, and also riparian thickets and secondary forest
